Description:

I'm trying to install scikit-image using pip3 install scikit-image, but I'm getting this error while it's preparing metadata(pyproject.toml).

```
Defaulting to user installation because normal site-packages is not writeable
Collecting scikit-image
  Using cached scikit_image-0.21.0.tar.gz (22.7 MB)
  Installing build dependencies ... done
  Getting requirements to build wheel ... done
  Installing backend dependencies ... done
  Preparing metadata (pyproject.toml) ... error
  error: subprocess-exited-with-error
  
  × Preparing metadata (pyproject.toml) did not run successfully.
  │ exit code: 1
  ╰─> [10 lines of output]
      + meson setup /tmp/pip-install-34zp83ux/scikit-image_45b16192f0814a62b1630f20613ff512 /tmp/pip-install-34zp83ux/scikit-image_45b16192f0814a62b1630f20613ff512/.mesonpy-_ej93eoj/build -Dbuildtype=release -Db_ndebug=if-release -Db_vscrt=md --native-file=/tmp/pip-install-34zp83ux/scikit-image_45b16192f0814a62b1630f20613ff512/.mesonpy-_ej93eoj/build/meson-python-native-file.ini
      The Meson build system
      Version: 1.1.1
      Source dir: /tmp/pip-install-34zp83ux/scikit-image_45b16192f0814a62b1630f20613ff512
      Build dir: /tmp/pip-install-34zp83ux/scikit-image_45b16192f0814a62b1630f20613ff512/.mesonpy-_ej93eoj/build
      Build type: native build
      
      ../../meson.build:7:11: ERROR: Command `/tmp/pip-install-34zp83ux/scikit-image_45b16192f0814a62b1630f20613ff512/skimage/_build_utils/version.py` failed with status 127.
      
      A full log can be found at /tmp/pip-install-34zp83ux/scikit-image_45b16192f0814a62b1630f20613ff512/.mesonpy-_ej93eoj/build/meson-logs/meson-log.txt
      [end of output]
  
  note: This error originates from a subprocess, and is likely not a problem with pip.
error: metadata-generation-failed

× Encountered error while generating package metadata.
╰─> See above for output.

note: This is an issue with the package mentioned above, not pip.
hint: See above for details`
```

### Way to reproduce:

pip3 install scikit-image

### Version information:

```Shell
3.8.10(default, May 26 2023, 14:05:08) [GCC 9.4.0]
Linux-5.4.51-v7l+-armv7l-with-glibc2.29
```
